title: If Rei was related to you
display_title: If Rei was related to you
wikitext:
[]: If Rei was related to you . . .             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun May 25, 2008 6:40 pm Another dumb hypothetical question . . . What would it be like if Rei was a close relative of yours (for example a sister) and you had to be in contact with her every day due to aforementioned circumstance? Would you help her be more social? Would you ignore her? Would you be a dick and take advantage of her obedience ? Be creative, since this is in no way serious at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun May 25, 2008 9:04 pm Iron Rooster wrote: What would it be like if Rei was a close relative of yours (for example a sister)

[]:             Quote Post by Devil_505 » Sun May 25, 2008 9:06 pm Since I have trouble socializing myself, I'd probably keep to myself. If this was the Angelic Days Rei, however, I'd probably open up to her.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun May 25, 2008 9:14 pm If I still recognized her I would stand up and sit next to her and ask her where she get the hair dye, and if she knew about Rammstein.

[]:             Quote Post by Kurochi » Sun May 25, 2008 10:30 pm Kill myself, probably. I couldn't handle the emotional stress of trying to help her. She has too many problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 25, 2008 10:36 pm Kurochi wrote: Kill myself, probably. I couldn't handle the emotional stress of trying to help her. She has too many problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun May 25, 2008 10:55 pm You're talking about Shinji, right? Rei didn't have any problems, she was just quiet.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun May 25, 2008 11:08 pm half the time I would be annoyed, the other half I would be freaked out

[]:             Quote Post by Kurochi » Sun May 25, 2008 11:16 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Kurochi wrote: Kill myself, probably. I couldn't handle the emotional stress of trying to help her. She has too many problems.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun May 25, 2008 11:56 pm I'd take one look at her and flee in terror once I saw her disfigured, bug-eyed, bleach-skinned face and grotesquely overdeveloped body. What do you mean "anime proportions"?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon May 26, 2008 12:20 am chee wrote: I'd take one look at her and flee in terror once I saw her disfigured, bug-eyed, bleach-skinned face and grotesquely overdeveloped body.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 26, 2008 12:34 am You know this got me thinking, you know if you got to live out the dork fantasy where for unknown reasons you and Rei share a bed. You aren't Reis lover, your just a person who happens to share a bed with her for some reason. It would be sexy, but at the same time it would be very awkward if you think about it. I mean you'd like have this uber quiet person sleeping next to you all the time. And then if you touch her boobs on accident you won't know how to react. Should you just say to hell with it and just touch them whenever you want, or would the guilt of touching the boobs of an unresponsive girl be too much for you to handle? Or what if your like me and sleep in the nude? You wouldn't even need to sleep in the nude though, nude or not there would be potential for accidents. If Rei has a funky dream and roles over and touches you know where in her sleep and then doesn't move anymore leaving her hand there! Do you take her hand off of it, or do you just leave it there and see what happens?That would also be an awkward situation. And she wouldn't understand why it suddenly got all hard either if she woke up and you would need to explain to her why that happens to guys. Or you would lie and tell her it was thermal expansion because she has warm hands even though their ice cold. And lastly theres the issue that it appears Rei coughs up blood sometimes since she had blood on her pillow. That could cause problems. People who have dork fantasies about Rei don't think these things through enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon May 26, 2008 12:54 am You know, I think there was a movie or a book with two kids (a boy and girl) on some island by themselves for year. They got there when they were too young to know about the difference between boys and girls. As they got older, no one had taught them about sex, but they eventually started to find out on their own. I think something like the girl saw the boy masturbating or something like that got that started. Okay, then . . . When I started the topic, I was actually thinking more in terms of like sister or cousin. If that was the case, I'd feel bad for her due to her inability to open up to people. Maybe if she had an actual family and not that manipulative ass, Gendo, for a role model then maybe she'd be more normal. I'd try to help her make friends and open up to others. Hell, with the exception of social skills, she's probably the most brilliant of the pilots in any other area. If someone could help her with that, she could be a top government figure, a business woman, or a director for a revolutionary new anime. Oh yeah, remember, Rei does not dream. So no midnight groping FROM her would probably occur if you shared a bed with her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 26, 2008 12:56 am Defectron wrote: Or what if your like me and sleep in the nude? You wouldn't even need to sleep in the nude though, nude or not there would be potential for accidents. If Rei has a funky dream and roles over and touches you know where in her sleep and then doesn't move anymore leaving her hand there! Do you take her hand off of it, or do you just leave it there and see what happens?That would also be an awkward situation. And she wouldn't understand why it suddenly got all hard either if she woke up and you would need to explain to her why that happens to guys. Or you would lie and tell her it was thermal expansion because she has warm hands even though their ice cold. And lastly theres the issue that it appears Rei coughs up blood sometimes since she had blood on her pillow. That could cause problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 26, 2008 1:12 am Regardless of how I'd know her, I'd try to be friendly to her and help Rei... But because she's more quiet than Shinji it'd be very hard and painful to get her to open up/help her deal with her problems. Plus I'd probably be a little scared of her even though I know she's a good person.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon May 26, 2008 1:49 am Defectron wrote: I mean you'd like have this uber quiet person sleeping next to you all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by Dancemacabre » Mon May 26, 2008 2:34 am I wouldn't take advantage of Rei, that's for sure, but I would try to get to know her a little before being too affectionate or friendly-Rei just wouldn't understand notions such as that unless she's given time to realise what it is and become a little more used to you. If I were ever in a romantic relationship with Rei (which I fervently wish I were) I wouldn't really be interested in a physical relationship... at least not until much much later. ... does that make me one weird puppy, considering that Rei is drop-dead gorgeous? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Mon May 26, 2008 2:45 am Little sister Rei... I would: 1. Keep an eye out for crazed, stalking, fan-boys like the (seeming) majority of members on this forum. 2. Ask her questions and not budge until an answer is given. 3. Challenge her to Bomberman, she might be a good competitor.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 26, 2008 3:39 am I'd kill her...because she's nothing but a clone and doesn't feel pain so I might as well kill her... Or put her in a mental hospital... :)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 26, 2008 4:00 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I'd kill her...because she's nothing but a clone and doesn't feel pain so I might as well kill her... Or put her in a mental hospital... :)
